title: Abdominal pain
license_notes: Use as public patient-education source support. Avoid verbatim copying into primitives unless reuse terms are confirmed for the exact content.
supports: Abdominal pain can occur anywhere between the chest and groin and may have many causes.
Home-care advice for abdominal pain depends on the suspected cause and should not override clinician instructions.
Return precautions should remain conservative because early abdominal emergencies can evolve after an initially reassuring evaluation.
